priorities.title: Process drift cleanup (push S11 autocommit)
priorities.check_method: git push origin master — pushed ca6f10c [state-autocommit] S11 PLUS fc982af [state-autocommit] S11 (second autocommit that materialized during the push as the state-hook fired again). e565d60..fc982af master->master. Post-push verification: (1) git status shows 'Your branch is up to date with origin/master'; (2) git log -5 confirms fc982af is HEAD; (3) push succeeded with no force, no --no-verify, no -i; (4) zero source/test/typecheck regression possible — both commits are content-preserving state-autocommits. No source file changes in either commit (verified by handoff carry-forward note + git log message pattern).

priorities.title: effectsRenderer per-kind split (Standard, Council-revised)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20) post-refactor: (1) Dead-silhouette audit ran first — grep src/combos.ts vs the 13 silhouette cases in drawBondCommit's switch. RESULT: zero deletions — all 12 magic IDs (fx.filament, fx.cable, fx.bracket, fx.diamond, fx.wheel, fx.star, fx.orbital, fx.lattice, fx.capsule, fx.vortex, fx.whip, fx.warped) PLUS fx.bond.default actively emitted by combos.ts. (2) 8 source files written under src/render/effects/ (bondCommit, lifetime, scoreTier, severErase, silhouettes, structureGrow, structureMerge — 7 files) + parent rewrite (effectsRenderer.ts 569→116 LOC) + new smoke test (effectsRenderer.test.ts). (3) Public surface preserved: EffectsRenderer class signature unchanged (ctor takes Application, sync/activeCount/destroy stable). main.ts:40,82,165,168 imports unchanged. (4) SEVER_ERASE drawer newly extracted from inline parent body (lines 117-134 of original) into severErase.ts for shape consistency with other 4 kinds. (5) Council R1 adoptions verified in artifact: silhouettes.ts split separately from bondCommit.ts per Grok #3 (243+86 LOC vs combined ~280); CI smoke test added per Gemini #1 (22 new tests). Risks #4 (Graphics ownership) + #5 (world.tick state) confirmed removed-by-design — parent owns Graphics, calls g.clear() once per sync, drawers receive g + age:number as pure-fn params, never read world.tick. (6) Tests: npx vitest run → 201/201 pass (179 prior + 22 new smoke covering effectLifetime/per-kind dispatch/all 12 magic silhouettes/class lifecycle). (7) Typecheck: npx tsc -b --noEmit → exit 0, no output. (8) § XV LOC compliance: wc -l shows no file >500 (largest: silhouettes.ts at 243 LOC; parent 116 LOC). (9) Commit 80f52e8 (9 files: 7 new + 1 rewrite + 1 new test; +752 -485) pushed to origin/master (fc982af..80f52e8). Browser playtest deferred — refactor is pure code-motion + extract-to-function + new test, no behavior change expected; user is already playtest-gated on cinematics constants tuning from S10 (top backlog priority).
